_description: Real, sourced baseline figures for the scenario slider module. The user-adjustable delta is illustrative; the starting point is factual.

_sources.eu_defence: SIPRI Military Expenditure Database, 2022 data. https://www.sipri.org/databases/milex
_sources.eu_budget: European Commission, EU Budget 2022 in figures. https://commission.europa.eu/strategy-and-policy/eu-budget/documents_en
_sources.us_federal_budget: US Office of Management and Budget, Historical Tables, Table 1.1 (2022 outturn). https://www.whitehouse.gov/omb/budget/historical-tables/
_sources.us_gdp: US Bureau of Economic Analysis, GDP 2022. https://www.bea.gov/data/gdp/gross-domestic-product
_sources.nato_target: NATO, Defence Expenditure of NATO Countries (2014–2022). https://www.nato.int/cps/en/natohq/news_197077.htm

eu27_defence_spend_bn_eur.label: EU27 combined defence expenditure, 2022
eu27_defence_spend_bn_eur.note: Approximate sum of EU27 member-state defence budgets. Not an EU institutional budget line.

eu_budget_bn_eur.label: EU27 budget commitments, 2022
eu_budget_bn_eur.source: European Commission, EU Budget 2022 in figures

eu_budget_pct_gdp.label: EU budget as % of EU27 GDP, 2022
eu_budget_pct_gdp.note: Excludes Next Generation EU disbursements. Including NGEU grants: approx. 1.4%.

us_federal_budget_pct_gdp.label: US federal budget as % of US GDP, 2022
us_federal_budget_pct_gdp.source: US OMB Historical Tables 1.1; US BEA GDP 2022

eu_defence_pct_gdp.label: EU27 combined defence spend as % of EU27 GDP, 2022

nato_2pct_target_implied_bn_eur.label: Implied EU27 defence budget if all members met NATO 2% target, 2022
nato_2pct_target_implied_bn_eur.note: Arithmetic projection — not a policy proposal or forecast. Labeled [illustrative] in the UI.

eda_collab_pct.label: EU collaborative defence procurement as % of total EU27 defence R&T, 2022

defence_pooling.label: Defence procurement pooled at EU level
defence_pooling.formula: Implied common defence budget = (slider_value / 100) × EU27 total defence spend (€214bn, SIPRI 2022). Non-pooled remainder stays national. This is arithmetic, not a forecast.

reference.label: US DoD budget (2022)
reference.source: US OMB; converted at 2022 avg rate ~$1 = €0.95

fiscal_transfer.label: Common EU fiscal capacity as % of EU GDP
fiscal_transfer.formula: Implied EU fiscal capacity = (slider_value / 100) × EU27 GDP (€14,491bn, Eurostat 2022). The delta above 1.16% is new money beyond the current budget — labeled [illustrative]. The 1.16% baseline is real.

reference.label: US federal budget as % of GDP (2022)
